Yu-Jen Lin About Projects Lab

Retinal-Resolution Varifocal VR

Research Unity3D VR

Varifocal VR is a Time Machine project that lets us glimpse the future of immersive experiences with dynamic focus adjustment, aligning perfectly with our eyes’ natural vision

Retina Resolution Prototype

Research Unity3D VR

Retina Resolution Prototype is a Time Machine project help us look into the future where VR display has enough pixel density that it meets the resolving power of the human eye.

Mario Kart: Koopa's Challenge™

Theme-Entertainment AR Networking Simulation

The Secret Life of Pets: Off the Leash

Research Theme-Entertainment Computer Vision

A experience that transforms guests into stray puppies as they journey to become loved and adopted

Stranger Things Pop-Up Experience

Theme-Entertainment Kinect Voice Recognition

Magic Table

Multi-touch Table Computer Vision OpenFrameworks Projection Mapping

Magic Table is aiming for creating an easy-to-use prototype platform for tabletop interaction. It can sense multiple touch inputs as well as fiducial markers for object tracking. The user can also use speech command to interact with it.

Lux

Unity3D Platform Game Game Design Windows Mac

Lux is a 2D platformer in which the player must venture out from the safety of the underground city of Lux and into the danger of darkness in search of an inexhaustible source of light.

A Dream Journey in Taipei

Android Unity3D Museum Exhibition Augmented Reality Indoor Localization

"Immersive, participatory and surprising. Visitors are taken on a magical adventure with the help of a mobile device and digital exhibits. It takes the immersive experience up several notches, creates an engaging and fully interactive experience for users, moves the device to an integral part of the experience."

Comic Reader

Electron Open Source

Comic Reader is an open source comics reading app. It supports search and subscription which can let you manage the comics with ease. It displays each episode in a single scrolling page, and automatically adjust the page size to provide maximum reading area. Reading comic can never be this easy.

Face Alignment

Matlab Computer Vision

Real-time camera-based face alignment algorithm implemented in Matlab

3D Printing

Rhino3D Blender 3D Printing

3D Modeling and 3D Printing Practice

Social Sensory Architecture

Kinect Computer Vision OpenFrameworks Unity3D Projection Mapping

A research project led by Prof. Sean Ahlquist at the University of Michigan to design technology-embedded multi-sensory environments for children with autism spectrum disorder.

Olegoru

OpenFrameworks Tangible Interaction Machine Learning

A soundscape composition tool to enhance imaginative storytelling with tagible objects.

Whisper of the Hear•t

Kinect Computer Vision Unity3D

Whisper of the Hear•t is an immersive sound room that translates a two dimensional painting into a four dimensional representation.

Windows 8 Reimagined

C# Unity3D Museum Exhibition

An installation art for Microsoft to promote Windows 8 at the art festival, 7th Digital Art Festival Taipei 2012 - Artificial Nature

Bailey's Photobooth

C++ ActionScripts 3.0 Computer Vision

An art installation photobooth for Bailey's
